hero.title: Stop comparing vendor quotes in spreadsheets
hero.subtitle: Quotal extracts line items from any document — PDF, Excel, email — and gives you a normalized side-by-side comparison in seconds. Hidden fees flagged automatically.

card1.title: Every quote is different
card1.description: Supplier A sends a PDF. Supplier B sends Excel. Supplier C replies in an email. You spend hours copying numbers into a spreadsheet just to compare them.

card2.title: Hidden fees slip through
card2.description: Fuel surcharges buried in footnotes. Palletization fees on page 3. Minimum order penalties in the fine print. Your team catches them after the PO is signed.

card3.title: It takes forever
card3.description: A procurement team of 3 spends 15+ hours per week normalizing quotes. That's €40K+ per year in salary spent on copy-paste work.

step1.title: Upload or forward
step1.description: Drag and drop any file — PDF, Excel, image, or paste raw text. Or just forward the supplier's email to your unique Quotal inbox.

step2.title: AI extracts & normalizes
step2.description: Quotal reads every document, extracts line items, converts units and currencies, and maps equivalent products across vendors.

step3.title: Compare & decide
step3.description: A clean side-by-side table shows the best price per item, flags hidden fees, and highlights the best overall deal. Done.

features.label: FEATURES
features.title: Built for how procurement actually works

anyFormat.title: Any format, any language
anyFormat.description: PDF, Excel, CSV, images, email text. Quotes in English, German, French, Dutch, Spanish — Quotal handles them all.

hiddenFees.title: Hidden fee detection
hiddenFees.description: AI scans footnotes, fine print, and buried line items to surface fees your team might miss.

email.title: Email forwarding
email.description: Forward supplier emails to your unique Quotal address. Quotes are extracted and added automatically.

history.title: Historical price tracking
history.description: See how each vendor's prices change over time. Spot trends before your next negotiation.

normalization.title: Smart normalization
normalization.description: "Corrugated Box 40x30x20cm" and "Corr. Box 400×300×200mm" are recognized as the same product.

gdpr.title: GDPR compliant
gdpr.description: Hosted in Europe. Your data stays in the EU. No vendor data is shared or used for training.

socialProof.label: TESTIMONIALS
socialProof.title: Trusted by procurement teams worldwide
socialProof.subtitle: See why teams are switching to Quotal for vendor quote comparison.

pricing.label: PRICING
pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade when it clicks.

cta.title: Ready to stop copy-pasting quotes?
cta.subtitle: Start comparing vendor quotes in seconds. Free forever.
cta.note: Free plan. No credit card needed.

Inbox.emptyHint: Forward supplier emails to your inbox address and they'll appear here.

Email.title: Email Forwarding
Email.description: Forward any supplier quote email to your unique inbox address and we'll extract it automatically.
Email.step1: Receive a quote email from a supplier
Email.step2: Forward the email to your inbox address above
Email.step3: We extract all attachments and email body text
Email.step4: AI processes the quote and adds it to your latest project
Email.step5: You get a confirmation email when it's ready
Email.webhookNote: This feature requires a Postmark inbound webhook configuration. For the MVP, the webhook endpoint is ready at {endpoint} and can be tested via curl or Postman.

Common.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
Common.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete all quotes and extracted data in this project. This action cannot be undone.

danger.heading: Danger Zone
danger.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account, all projects, and all quotes. This cannot be undone.
danger.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. Type your email address to confirm.
